objectives.title: Classification of Weligama Coconut Leaf Wilt Disease
objectives.description: Classify Weligama Coconut Leaf Wilt Disease (WCLWD) and distinguish its uneven yellowing symptoms from similar disorders. Determine symptom severity using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to support timely preventive actions by the Coconut Research Institute of Sri Lanka (CRISL).

objectives.title: Classification of Coconut Caterpillar Infestation
objectives.description: Develop a solution to identify Coconut Caterpillar Infestation (CCI) while differentiating its symptoms from other conditions. Estimate infestation severity and notify relevant authorities to accelerate control measures and prevent potential outbreaks.

objectives.title: Differentiating Magnesium Deficiency, Coconut Leaf Scorching, and Water Resources
objectives.description: Identify yellowing patterns associated with magnesium deficiency, detect leaf scorch decline (LSD), and determine whether water resources are available within a 100 m radius to support continuous monitoring and prevention workflows.

objectives.title: Crowdsourcing for Information Sharing
objectives.description: Provide a convenient platform for farmers and industry professionals to visualize disease dispersion and receive severity-based notifications, improving collaborative decision-making and response speed.
